app_description: Manage your money exchange and transfer operations with local SQLite storage.
error_bridge: Electron bridge is not available. Run this in desktop mode.
sign_out_confirm_message: Are you sure you want to sign out?
login_description: Use your email/password or continue with Google.
login_set_password_prompt: First time signing in? Set your password
login_invalid_credentials: Invalid email or password. If this is a new database, create an account first.
overview_description: Manage your money exchange and transfer operations from the desktop app.
overview_set_rate: Enter an exchange rate to convert to the main currency.
shared_settings_description: Apply this workspace's ledger and transaction table layout — column visibility, order, and display settings — to everyone in the workspace. As the owner, your table settings become the shared defaults; members can still adjust their own view until you change the shared ones.
shared_settings_active_hint: Sharing is on. Your changes to the ledger and transaction tables now update everyone's default view.
settings_description: Manage your database connection, language, organizations, clients, and currencies from one place.
settings_database_description: Arkam now uses PostgreSQL. Configure the live database connection with the DATABASE_URL environment variable.
settings_database_hint: Each workspace uses its own PostgreSQL schema. Change the connection by updating DATABASE_URL and restarting the app.
backup_description: Download a full copy of this workspace's data, or restore it from a backup file you downloaded earlier.
backup_download_hint: Saves all organizations, clients, accounts, currencies, transactions, and adjustments to a single backup file.
backup_restore_hint: Upload a previously downloaded backup file. This replaces all current data in this workspace.
backup_restore_confirm: Restoring will permanently replace all data in this workspace with the contents of the backup file. Continue?
backup_restore_invalid_file: This file is not a valid Arkam backup.
settings_language_description: Choose the language used across the application interface.
organizations_description: Create and maintain the organizations you manage inside the app.
organization_page_description: View all clients assigned to this organization.
organization_page_no_organization: Open an organization to see its clients.
organization_page_no_clients: No clients are assigned to this organization yet.
name: Name
no_organizations: No organizations yet. Add your first organization from the form.
organization_delete_confirm: Delete this organization? Related clients will remain but become unassigned.
clients_description: Track your clients and assign each one a currency account.
client_exclude_from_balance_hint: This client can still be selected as a sender/receiver and keeps its own balance, but is left out of the pooled totals on the Overview and Organizations pages (e.g. for a "me" client tracking personal transfers).
client_currency_required: Please select a currency to open an account for this client.
no_clients: No clients yet. Add your first client from the form.
client_name_duplicate: A client with this name already exists.
currencies_description: Built-in currencies are available automatically. Choose which one should be the main currency.
currencies_seeded_description: The app now seeds a full currency catalog automatically and shows currency names in the current app language. Manual currency creation and editing are no longer needed.
currency_catalog_search_placeholder: Type a currency code or name
currency_catalog_empty: All seeded currencies have already been added to the used list.
currency_disable_confirm: Remove this currency from the used currencies list?
currency_disable_confirm_used: This currency is already used in client accounts or transactions. Removing it from the used currencies list will hide it from new selections but will not delete existing records. Continue?
currency_required: Currency code and name are required.
currency_delete_confirm: Delete this currency? Clients linked to it will lose their currency assignment.
transactions_description: Record exchange and transfer operations between currencies.
transaction_description_split: Use a different description for each client
no_transactions: No transactions yet. Create your first transaction from the form.
client_page_description: Track balances and every transaction for this client, separated by account currency.
client_page_no_client: Open a client page from the Clients tab to see balances and ledger history.
client_page_no_transactions: No transactions for this account yet.
balance_type_hint: Debit = client owes you · Credit = you owe client
client_account_delete_confirm: Close this account? Existing transactions referencing it will also be deleted.
client_account_move_hint: Re-points every transaction and adjustment from this account onto the selected account. Only this client's other accounts are listed.
client_account_move_no_targets: This client has no other account. Create one first to move transactions into it.
client_account_move_confirm: Move all transactions and adjustments from this account to {{target}}? This cannot be undone automatically.
no_client_accounts: No accounts yet. Open the first account below.
transactions_export_hint: Choose a date range, then download as PDF or Excel. Leave dates empty to export all.
transactions_export_empty: No transactions in the selected date range.
transaction_required: Both accounts, amount, and currency are required.
transaction_party_required: At least one party (sender or receiver), amount, and currency are required.
live_rates_description: Real-time gold and currency quotes from the market feed. Refreshes automatically.
live_rates_error: Could not load live rates. Please try again.
live_rates_disclaimer: The data shown here is free-market data sourced from datshop.com.tr and is provided for informational purposes only.
archive_description: Transactions still missing a sender or receiver. Edit a row to assign the missing party — it leaves the archive once both parties are set.
archive_empty: No archived transactions. Transactions missing a sender or receiver will appear here.
archive_new_transaction_hint: A historical record from before this database. It is not applied to any client and never appears in the main transactions.
archive_only_badge_hint: Created in the Archive — a pre-database record. Not applied to clients or the main transactions.
adjustment_required: Account, amount, and currency are required.
transaction_client_no_currency: One or both selected clients have no currency assigned.
ledger_sum_mode_hint: Sum mode: click amounts or net changes to add them up; click again to remove. Turn off to clear.
tx_sum_mode_hint: Sum mode: click amounts to add them up; click again to remove. Turn off to clear.
ledger_rate_pending: Exchange rate needed — excluded from balance until set
commission_from_him: Commission from the client — click to make it for the client
commission_for_him: Commission for the client — click to make it from the client
ledger_row_click_toggle: Click a row to highlight it
ledger_row_highlight_hint: Click any row in the ledger to highlight it with this color.
ledger_pending_balance_note: {{count}} entry awaiting an exchange rate — excluded from this balance
ledger_pending_balance_note_plural: {{count}} entries awaiting an exchange rate — excluded from this balance
export_use_highlights_hint: Sets the range from your first highlighted row to your last highlighted row — both rows are included in the export.
settings_pdf_description: Configure what appears in exported PDF account statements, independently from the on-screen ledger view.
pdf_columns_hint: Choose which columns to include. Running balance is always included.
pdf_decimals_hint: Number of decimal places for all amounts in the PDF.
pdf_font_family_hint: Typeface used for all text in the PDF.
pdf_font_size_hint: Base font size for the PDF.
pdf_head_font_size_hint: Font size for the table header row in the PDF.
pdf_date_format_hint: Choose how dates appear in the Date column of the exported PDF.
pdf_sections_hint: Toggle which sections appear in the exported PDF.
pdf_show_pre_balance_hint: Show the pre-period balance above the transactions table.
pdf_show_meta_client_hint: Show the client name in the summary cards.
pdf_show_meta_currency_hint: Show the currency in the summary cards.
pdf_show_meta_period_hint: Show the date range in the summary cards.
pdf_show_generated_on_hint: Show the date when the PDF was generated.
pdf_show_currency_symbol_hint: Show the currency symbol next to amounts.
pdf_highlight_net_change_hint: Shade the net change column with a light background.
pdf_show_footer_hint: Show the Arkam Exchange footer at the bottom.
settings_danger_description: Use these actions only when you intentionally want to wipe major data sets.
danger_zone_warning_body: These actions permanently delete data and cannot be undone.
danger_action_cannot_undo: This action is permanent and cannot be undone.
danger_delete_all_transactions_hint: Removes every transaction record from the system.
danger_delete_all_clients_hint: Removes every client and related accounts from the system.
adjustment_debit_hint: The client owes you this amount (e.g. gas money you took on their behalf).
adjustment_credit_hint: You owe the client this amount (e.g. money you owe them for an item).
adjustment_amount_required: Enter a valid amount greater than zero.
reconcile_remove_confirm: Remove this reconciliation mark? The lock protecting earlier rows will be lifted.
reconcile_warn_message: This account was reconciled with the client at a balance of {{balance}}. This change affects a transaction at or before that point and may invalidate the reconciliation.
drag_date_change_message: Dropping it here will change its date from {{from}} to {{to}}.
write_off_confirm_message: This creates a {amount} {currency} adjustment to zero out {name}'s balance. This cannot be undone.
write_off_row_confirm_message: This inserts a {amount} {currency} adjustment right after this row to zero out the running balance ({balance}) at this point. Later rows continue from zero. This cannot be undone.
import_setup_subtitle: {{fileName}} — match the sheet columns and pick a currency before reviewing clients.
import_setup_more_info_label: Where is the More info column? (optional)
import_review_subtitle: {{count}} names were read from {{fileName}}. For each one, create a new client, pick an existing client, choose which currency accounts to open, or mark it as an expense instead of a client.
import_review_bulk_hint: Transactions need an account in the import currency on both sides — clients missing it are skipped.
import_review_expense_hint: Decide what each row containing “{{name}}” should become. Each defaults to a debit (owes you) on the other party.
import_review_no_accounts_hint: This client has no accounts yet — a {{code}} account will be opened.
import_review_existing_no_accounts: This client has no accounts — its rows will be skipped.
import_review_ref_no_accounts: The referenced client has no accounts yet — add accounts to "{{name}}" first.
import_review_accounts_required: Required — add at least one account.
import_skip_hint_pre: the following names have no account configured:
import_skip_hint_post: Go back and add accounts for them to avoid losing those rows.
import_err_no_file: No file is selected for import.
import_err_mapping: Please answer the column mapping questions before importing.
import_err_mapping_archive: Please choose an Amount column and at least a Sender or Receiver column before importing.
import_err_currency: Please choose a currency for this import.
import_err_currency_not_found: Selected currency was not found. Please reselect it.
import_err_review_first: Please review the clients before importing.
import_err_name_required: Every new client must have a name before importing.
import_err_account_required: Please add at least one account for "{{name}}" before importing.
import_err_target_required: Please select which account "{{name}}" rows should post to.
import_err_existing_account_required: Please select an account for "{{name}}" before importing.
home_hero_title: Accounting built for currency exchange businesses
home_hero_subtitle: Track clients, multi-currency ledgers, and transactions in one fast, secure workspace.
home_feature_ledgers_body: Per-client, per-currency balances kept accurate on every transaction.
home_feature_multicurrency_body: Handle any currencies with exchange rates, commissions, and charges.
home_feature_exports_body: Export to PDF and Excel, and back up or restore your whole workspace.
home_pricing_note: After signing up you'll pay in USDT and your access is activated once approved.
login_pending_approval: Your access request is awaiting approval. You'll get an email once it's approved.
login_access_rejected: Your access request was not approved. Please contact support.
login_subscription_expired: Your subscription has ended. Renew to continue using Arkam.
set_password_desc: First time signing in? Enter the email or username your admin gave you and choose a password.
signup_trial_badge: Start your {{days}}-day free trial — no payment required.
signup_already_have: Already have an account? Sign in
signup_check_inbox_sent: We sent a verification link to
signup_check_inbox_hint: Click the link in the email to finish setting up your account. It expires in 24 hours.
signup_link_invalid: This link is invalid or has expired. Please sign up again.
signup_password_too_short: Password must be at least 8 characters.
signup_password_complexity: Password must contain both letters and numbers.
signup_payment_network_warning: Send only USDT on the {{network}} network. Sending other assets or using another network may lose your funds.
signup_payment_not_configured: Payment details are not available right now. Please contact support before paying.
signup_proof_hint: PNG, JPG, or WEBP, up to 5MB.
signup_proof_invalid_type: Screenshot must be a PNG, JPG, or WEBP image.
signup_pending_body: Your payment is under review. We'll email you when your access is approved:
account_subscription_desc: Your current plan status and renewal.
account_renew_pending: A renewal payment is pending approval. Your subscription will be extended once approved.
subscription_banner_expiring: Your subscription expires in {{days}} days. Renew now to avoid losing access.
subscription_banner_expired: Your subscription has expired. Renew now to restore access.
account_email_desc: Change the email address you use to sign in.
account_email_changed: Email updated. Please sign in again with your new address.
account_email_invalid: Please enter a valid email address.
account_email_taken: This email is already in use.
account_password_desc: Change the password you use to sign in.
account_password_too_short: New password must be at least 8 characters.
team_invite_desc: Add people to your workspace and choose what they can do. No email? Enter a username instead.
team_invite_no_email_notice: Member added. Since that's not an email address, no invite was sent — share the username with them and have them set a password at /set-password.
team_members_desc: People with access to this workspace.
team_new_workspace_desc: Super admin only, for now. Sets up a separate workspace with its own data, owned by you.
team_workspaces_desc: Workspaces you belong to. Only the owner of a workspace can rename or delete it.
team_workspace_delete_message: "{name}" has {count} transaction(s). This will permanently delete the workspace and everything in it. This cannot be undone.
